content: We can reframe the Self-Refine framework as a minimal base implementation of LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where multi-perspective reflection from broader self-reflection research can be injected into Self-Refine’s iterative loop to eliminate blind spots in single-perspective self-feedback. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while improving output quality by addressing the inherent bias of a single LLM judging its own work.
